top3_zh: Vercel 的入侵 IOC 披露才是今天真正的新闻：攻击通过"一款第三方 AI 工具的 Google Workspace OAuth 应用程序——该应用已遭到更广泛的入侵，可能影响了许多组织中数百名用户"作为跳板（[decipher.sc](https://decipher.sc/2026/04/19/vercel-says-internal-systems-hit-in-breach/)，376 点赞 / [HN 主帖](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824463)，609 点赞 / 343 条评论）。攻击面是*所有曾通过 OAuth 连接过 AI 工具的 SaaS*，而不仅仅是 Vercel。

[@bill-chambers 的匿名 token 排行榜](https://tokens.billchambers.me/leaderboard)现已有 580 条社区提交记录，显示 Opus 4.7 的请求 token 平均较 4.6 增加 +38.5%。与此同时，Artificial Analysis 确认 4.7 的完整 Intelligence Index 成本约 $4,406——比 4.6 的 $4,970 便宜约 11%——因为输出 token 节省抵消了 tokenizer 膨胀（[@hereme888 引用](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47827613)）。单次调用成本与单任务成本讲的是相反的故事。

两个独立的 Hetzner 迁移信号在 24 小时内接连出现：@isayeter 的[从 DigitalOcean 迁移到 Hetzner 的帖子](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47815774)（864 点赞，422 条评论），记录了从 $1,432/月降至 $233/月的过程；[@antirez 的置顶评论](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47815774)确认 Claude Code 帮助迁移了"两台服务器，一台从 Linode，另一台从 DO 迁移到 Hetzner，几个月前完成的"。LLM 辅助基础设施迁移现在是一个有据可查的可重复工作流，不再只是 demo。
top3_en: Vercel's breach IOC disclosure is the real news today: the attack pivoted through "a third-party AI tool whose Google Workspace OAuth app was the subject of a broader compromise, potentially affecting hundreds of its users across many organizations" ([decipher.sc](https://decipher.sc/2026/04/19/vercel-says-internal-systems-hit-in-breach/), 376 points / [HN primary](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824463), 609 points / 343 comments). The attack surface is *every SaaS that ever connected an AI tool via OAuth*, not Vercel specifically.

[@bill-chambers' anonymous-token leaderboard](https://tokens.billchambers.me/leaderboard) now has 580 community submissions showing Opus 4.7 averages +38.5% request tokens vs 4.6. Meanwhile Artificial Analysis confirms 4.7's full Intelligence Index costs ~$4,406 — ~11% *cheaper* than 4.6's $4,970 per benchmark — because output-token savings outweigh tokenizer bloat ([@hereme888 quote](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47827613)). Per-call vs per-task pricing tell opposite stories.

Two independent Hetzner-migration signals landed within 24 hours: @isayeter's [DigitalOcean→Hetzner post](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47815774) (864 points, 422 comments) documenting a $1,432/mo → $233/mo cut, and [@antirez's top comment](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47815774) confirming Claude Code migrated "two servers, one from Linode and the other from DO to Hetzner a few months ago" end-to-end. LLM-assisted infra migration is now a documented repeatable workflow, not a demo.
intro_zh: 今天读 Vercel 故事的人都在关注错误的那句话。[公司自己的 IOC 披露](https://decipher.sc/2026/04/19/vercel-says-internal-systems-hit-in-breach/)称，攻击"源自一款第三方 AI 工具，其 Google Workspace OAuth 应用程序遭到了更广泛的入侵，可能影响了许多组织中数百名用户。"将此与 [Notion 在每个公开页面泄露编辑者邮箱](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824945)（342 个 HN 点赞）以及 [Fiverr 否认 1040 表单被索引](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47769796)（828 点赞）结合来看，真正的故事不是"某一家供应商被入侵"——而是"你三年前忘记的那个 OAuth 应用，刚刚变成了供应链的跳板"。
intro_en: Everyone reading today's Vercel story is focused on the wrong sentence. The [company's own IOC disclosure](https://decipher.sc/2026/04/19/vercel-says-internal-systems-hit-in-breach/) says the attack "originated from a third-party AI tool whose Google Workspace OAuth app was the subject of a broader compromise, potentially affecting hundreds of its users across many organizations." Pair that with [Notion leaking editor emails on every public page](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824945) (342 HN points) and [Fiverr's indexed-1040s denial](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47769796) (828 points), and the real story is not "one vendor got breached" — it is "the OAuth app you forgot about three years ago just became a supply-chain pivot."
